title: Never Says Die
summary: You never quit, can shrug off a beating, and always come back for more.
tiers: Tier 3: Blood Fever or Hidden Reserves
Tier 4: Increasing Determination or Outlast the Foe
Tier 6: Final Defiance or Ignore Affliction
gm_intrusions: Sometimes, it’s equipment or weapons that give out.
text: You never quit, can shrug off a beating, and always come back for more.
details: You never quit, can shrug off a beating, and always come back for more.
